customInstructions: This is the Official Previous Year Paper for HP HRTC Conductor Exam held on October 19, 2014.
Total Questions: 80, Total Marks: 80, Total Time: 90 Minutes (1:30 Hrs).
There is NO negative marking in this exam.
Note: Several mathematical and factual errors present in the original 2014 answer key (e.g., Rovers Cup sport, Mathematics ratios) have been auto-corrected in this mock test for accurate practice.
